sharedRootCause: Backend domain records and frontend read models evolved with similar but non-identical field names, while adapters spread raw records without an explicit versioned projection contract.
whyAutomatedTestsMissedIt: Prior source-scan and service tests proved each side independently but did not assert the serialized Lead Workspace lifecycle field after an owner mutation.
whyBrowserQaMissedIt: Earlier journeys checked that components existed; they did not mutate a lifecycle state and then assert its semantic visual projection across refresh.
missingInvariant: Every domain lifecycle mutation must be projected through an explicit route field consumed by the UI, and route tests must assert both the stored value and serialized field.
missingAcceptanceJourney: A real-browser journey that creates a lead, promotes the same opportunity, asserts the Deal highlight, and repeats the assertion after refresh was missing.
sharedRepair: The Lead Workspace adapter now explicitly maps opportunity.lifecycle to lifecycleStatus instead of relying on raw-record field coincidence.
newRegressionTest: The Phase 1 route integration test asserts opportunity.lifecycleStatus on the serialized Lead Workspace and same-ID/publicUid promotion behavior.
newBrowserAssertion: phase1-manual-lead-promotion asserts deal-card-highlight immediately after pursuit and after hard refresh.
